description_long: This object is a classic parking meter with a rounded top and a rectangular body, commonly found on city streets. The front face features a prominent display window with a semicircular gauge, clearly marked with the word 'EXPIRED' in red, indicating the meter's status. Below the display, there is a coin slot and a circular button, both slightly raised for tactile feedback. The back of the meter is plain, with a smooth surface and no visible interactive elements. The sides are narrow and ribbed, providing structural reinforcement and a secure fit to the mounting post. The base of the meter is cylindrical, connecting the main body to a sturdy mounting post, likely made of metal for durability.
description: A classic, gray parking meter with a rounded top, a visible 'EXPIRED' gauge, coin slot, and a sturdy cylindrical mounting post. The front features interactive elements, while the back and sides are plain and reinforced.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'EXPIRED' gauge, coin slot, button, and main interactive features.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow, ribbed profile and the thickness of the meter body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, smooth surface with no visible interactive elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the ribbed edge and mounting post connection.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot is present on the front face, along with a circular button below it. No card, contactless, or mobile app interfaces are visible.
attribute_coin_slot: Present on the front face, rectangular in shape, located above the button, with a small slot for coin insertion.
attribute_mounting_post: A cylindrical metal mounting post is visible at the base, painted gray, securely connecting to the main body.
